title: Better Stuck Arrows
description:
Makes spectral arrows actually render as spectral arrows when stuck on a player.

 

If you get shot by a spectral arrow it will get stuck to the players model, without this mod it will show up as if it was a regular arrow
body:
Makes spectral arrows actually render as spectral arrows when stuck on a player.

 

If you get shot by a spectral arrow it will get stuck to the players model, without this mod it will show up as if it was a regular arrow.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/giLwmwL.png)
